summary: WYSIWYG Editor Integration Testing - Complete. All features tested and working: AdvancedRichEditor loads in Article/Property/Procedure forms with full toolbar. Article creation with formatted text (bold, italic, headings) works. HTML content is properly saved and rendered. Admin notification bell and Database/Demandes tab still functional.

design_issues.screen: All form pages with select elements
issues: Console hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - cosmetic issue from editor wrapper, doesn't affect functionality

frontend_article_form: Article form page (/admin/nouvelle) loads with AdvancedRichEditor toolbar visible
Rich editor content area has data-testid='rich-editor-content'
Editor toolbar shows all buttons: undo/redo, headings H1-H3, bold/italic/underline/strikethrough, font size/color, alignment, lists, blockquote, separator, encadré, links, image upload
Can type formatted text in editor (bold, italic)
Article submission with HTML content works - redirects to /admin dashboard
Toast notification 'Article publié avec succès!' displays
frontend_property_form: Property form page (/immobilier/publier) loads with AdvancedRichEditor for description field
Rich editor content area found with full toolbar
Form fields: title, type (vente/achat/location), price, currency, city, seller info all present
frontend_procedure_form: Procedure form page (/procedures/nouvelle) loads with AdvancedRichEditor
Form fields: title, pays (country select), cover image upload, content editor all present
frontend_article_detail: Article detail page renders HTML content properly
frontend_admin_features: Admin notification bell icon visible in header
Admin dashboard shows article count (4 articles)
/admin/database page loads with Demandes tab first
Demandes tab shows pending/approved/rejected requests with status badges
backend_wysiwyg_api: POST /api/articles - Creates article with HTML content
GET /api/articles/{id} - Returns article with HTML content preserved
POST /api/properties - Creates property with HTML description
POST /api/procedures - Creates procedure with HTML content
POST /api/upload - Upload endpoint exists for editor images

critical_code_review_comments: AdvancedRichEditor component well-structured with comprehensive toolbar
Minor: Console hydration warnings from span inside select/option - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_WYSIWYG_* test data during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: WYSIWYG editor integration fully tested. AdvancedRichEditor uses contentEditable div with data-testid='rich-editor-content'. To interact: click on editor area, then use page.keyboard.type() for text input. Toolbar buttons have title attributes for selection (e.g., button[title='Gras (Ctrl+B)'] for bold).
